source: traced from original WASM engine 2026-07-22, Little Ramp practice, ?classic=1

jump.note: REINTERPRETED 2026-07-22: sec 26 is the REAL gap-jump feature (lip -> dip floor y=320 -> steep kicker -> big climb to 3744 plateau -> descent). 2.28s = clearing the gap at ~92 and landing ON the climb. Below ~60 the car falls into the dip (crane-trap). Post-landing the original grinds UP the 0.125-slope climb at ~8-10 display: slope decel ~= full thrust there.
